untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) minimum 20-bar consolidation period (not directly expressible), (2) absence of major news/earnings/economic data within 48 hours (no news calendar indicator available), (3) breakout volume confirmation >= 120% of consolidation average (would require historical consolidation period volume averaging), and (4) 3x risk target calculation (requires dynamic stop-loss reference). The Donchian channels approximate range breakout detection, but cannot enforce the 20-bar minimum consolidation requirement or news catalyst filter. Volume ratio and hvol_20 are used as proxies but do not capture the specific consolidation-period volume comparison required.
translation_notes: Used dc_upper/dc_lower as proxies for consolidation range breakout detection. Range indicator approximates tight consolidation width check. hvol_20 used as volume percentile proxy. However, this translation loses critical elements: the mandatory 20-bar consolidation period validation, the 48-hour no-news requirement, and the specific breakout volume calculation relative to the consolidation period average. A complete implementation would require custom consolidation detection logic and external news data integration.
